User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Renacer Digital system.

documentType.description: Type of identification document (e.g., CC, CE).

socialSecurityCode.description: Social security code of the user.

role.description: The role of the user (e.g., administrator, case worker).

Case.title: Case
Case.description: Represents a social case managed within the system.

caseNumber.description: Unique number assigned to the case.

firstName.description: First name of the person involved in the case.

lastName.description: Last name of the person involved in the case.

documentId.description: Identification document of the person involved in the case.

internalId.description: Internal ID assigned to the case.

ethnicGroup.description: Ethnic group of the person involved in the case.

maritalStatus.description: Marital status of the person involved in the case.

gender.description: Gender of the person involved in the case.

birthDate.description: Date of birth of the person involved in the case.

address.description: Address of the person involved in the case.

veredaCorregimiento.description: Vereda or Corregimiento of the person involved in the case.

department.description: Department of the person involved in the case.

cellphone1.description: First cellphone number of the person involved in the case.

cellphone2.description: Second cellphone number of the person involved in the case.

displacementType.description: Type of displacement experienced by the person involved in the case.

disability.description: Disability of the person involved in the case.

age.description: Age of the person involved in the case.

isElderly.description: Indicates if the person involved in the case is an elderly person (yes/no).

numFamilyMembers.description: Number of family members in the person's household.

testimony.description: Testimony provided by the person involved in the case.

status.description: Current status of the case (e.g., Pending Payment, Pending Collection, No Issue).

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Access is restricted to the user themselves (path-based ownership).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores information about social cases.  Access is controlled based on user roles.  The `members` map is denormalized to support authorization independence, enabling rules to directly check if `request.auth.uid` is in the `members` map with the appropriate role without needing `get()` calls.  This is crucial for atomic operations and scalability.

params.name: caseId
params.description: The unique identifier of the case.

definition.description: Collection to store admin roles. Existence of document implies admin role for the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure is designed to support the Renacer Digital application, focusing on secure and efficient management of user data and social cases.  Authorization Independence is achieved by avoiding `get()` calls in security rules, relying instead on the `request.auth.uid` and path-based ownership for users. The structure also leverages structural segregation to ensure all documents within a collection share the same security requirements. 

`QAPs Support`:

1.  **Secure List Operations:** Path-based ownership for user data and clearly defined roles support secure `list` operations. Rules can efficiently check the `request.auth.uid` against the path to ensure only authorized users can list resources.
2.  **Roles:** DBAC is implemented through the use of dedicated role collections.

The structure prioritizes clarity, consistency, and security to ensure that the application can scale efficiently while maintaining data integrity.
